title: Weedie's Undead Adventure
description: A new zombie apocalypse pack where the zombies are split into many variants that can do different things while using lost cities for a modern touch to structure generation.
body:
This is my spin on a Zombie Apocalypse pack. Farmers delight is used for food and Productive Bees and Trees will assist in resource gathering. The main tech mod in this pack is Create and the main storage mod is Refined Storage. EMI is used instead of NEI as it seems to be more performant. Thirst was taken governs your need to drink water.
Parcool is added as parkour is fun. Sodium is used for performance along with Ferrite Core and Modern Fix. For anyone interested in VR, Vivecraft is included. EMF and ETF are used for texture and model features. Veinminer is added using Liteminer and Necessities is used for /back and /home features.

SERVER WARNING: DON'T INCLUDE anything Sodium or Iris Related in your server mods folder as these mods will crash a dedicated server! WaterMedia also should not be in your server folder as it doesnt work on servers.
